metadata.description: Studio Shipgate — turn end-of-cycle agent changes into a plain-language, step-by-step review a non-technical decision-maker can actually approve. Bundles /turbo.

plugins.name: shipgate
plugins.description: Purpose-built stepwise change-review surface for founders/PMs/designers: one decision-framed Change Card per screen (plain terms, why, impact, before/after, optional technical drawer), round-tripped back to Claude. Includes the /turbo autonomous-cycle skill (shipgate is turbo's end-of-run human gate).
